dialog_1: Listen to the sentence and fill in the correct answer.
dialog_2: Type the answer in the text box.
dialog_3: Press the microphone and say the answer.
question: Listen to the sentence and type the answer
click_access_all_lesson: Click this button to access all lessons.
click_select_correct_answer: Click to select the correct answer. There is only one correct answer.
click_fight_to_check_answer: Click the Fight button to check your answer
tutorial_multiple_choice_question_body: Kanda's salary is 52,680 baht. This month, she got 111,350 baht in total. “How much was her bonus?”
tutorial_multiple_choice_question_hightl: How can this be written as a symbolic sentence?
drag_n_drop_to_answer_box: Drag and drop then sort the answer into the answer box.
